scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix src/backend install && npm --prefix src/frontend install
scripts.deploy: npm run compile && npx hardhat run src/frontend/src/scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.start-all: npx concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.quick-dev: npx concurrently -k -n CHAIN,APP "npm run start-hardhat" "npx wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && npm run deploy && npm run start-all"
scripts.dev: npm run install-all && npm run quick-dev
